hero.description: Software Engineering student at Universidad Cooperativa de Colombia, Pasto campus. Mainly drawn to frontend development, where I combine logic and design to build interfaces that truly feel good.

music.title: Music
music.desc: I enjoy composing music and playing guitar, piano, bongos and some Andean instruments. This led me to participate in the Grand Parade and the Black and White Carnival of Pasto.

football.title: Football
football.desc: I enjoy playing football casually. My favorite teams are Real Madrid and Deportivo Pasto. My favorite player is Cristiano Ronaldo.

photo.title: Photography
photo.desc: I really enjoy landscapes and architecture, things I choose to immortalize through photography, a discipline I have knowledge in.

travel.title: Travel
travel.desc: I enjoy discovering new places, as I believe it means learning more about people's culture and new opportunities. I also like to explore, which has led me to know a great part of Colombia.

other.title: Something else
other.desc: That extra hobby or passion that doesn't fit any category but defines you.

skills.label: What I use
skills.title: Skills
skills.description: These are the technologies I work with every day, always learning something new.

freshcut.desc: Freshcut is not just a barbershop app, it's a tool to take this business to a more professional and organized level, centralizing appointments, clients, history and income in one place. It also integrates artificial intelligence that analyzes the user's face to recommend the best haircut and show a preview.

mercadolibre.desc: In a collaborative effort, a Mercado Libre clone was developed focused on strengthening skills to create large-scale applications, addressing real challenges of architecture, performance and code organization.

spottunes.desc: Spot-tunes was born in 2025 as an experimental project and evolved into a solid web app, with an experience very close to platforms like Spotify. It offers song previews and full playback control: forward, rewind, repeat and change tracks, all with a fluid and intuitive interface. Deployed on Vercel, optimized for performance and designed to scale.

calcgraf.desc: CalcGraf is a web app focused on multivariable calculus and 3D visualization. It allows graphing functions in real time, evaluating points, calculating double integrals and visualizing tangent planes with precision. Its interface is modern, fluid and intuitive, designed to understand complex concepts visually. More than a calculator, it's a platform to explore and analyze mathematics at another level.

testimonials.label: Kind words
testimonials.title: Testimonials
testimonials.t1: Working with Manuel was a very solid experience. He has a clear ability to structure solutions and turn ideas into real features. In the projects we worked on together, he always stood out for his organization and for keeping clean, understandable code.
testimonials.t2: Manuel doesn't just deliver what's asked, he goes beyond. He proposes improvements, takes care of interface details and cares about user experience. He's someone you can trust when you need quality results.
testimonials.t3: Something that stands out about Manuel is his constant learning mindset. In every project you can see how he improves and applies new technologies. He also knows how to work in a team and communicate his ideas clearly, which is key in software development.
testimonials.t4: Manuel has a very professional approach when developing. He's responsible, meets deadlines and adapts well to changes. His work reflects dedication and commitment to every detail of the project.

experience.w2_a1: Collaborative development of a Mercado Libre clone focused on large-scale architecture.
experience.w2_a2: Implementation of product management, navigation, search and user experience.
experience.w2_a3: Application of development best practices and teamwork.
experience.a1_a1: Currently in 5th semester with emphasis on frontend and backend development.
experience.a1_a2: Training in software architecture, software design and databases.

experience.a2_a1: Comprehensive academic training with emphasis on values and discipline.
experience.a2_a2: Development of teamwork and leadership skills.
experience.a3_a2: Development of creativity and social skills.
